title: 01.30.26 Weekly Reports Public Records Requests, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Service Requests
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: January 30, 2026
TO: Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Esha Singh, Management Assistant
DEPT: City Manager's Office
SUBJECT: Weekly Reports: Public Records Requests, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Service Requests

This memorandum includes weekly reports from the City Clerk's Office, Strategic Communications, and Code Enforcement to the Mayor and City Council for January 23, 2026 through January 29, 2026.

The following reports are attached:
• Public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office (attachment A)
• Weekly media requests received by Strategic Communications (attachment B)
• Weekly code enforcement service requests received by Code Enforcement (attachment C)

fields.tldr: This memorandum transmits weekly reports to the Mayor and City Council covering the period of January 23–29, 2026. It includes public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office, media requests handled by Strategic Communications, and code enforcement service requests. The attached logs detail dozens of individual requests spanning police records, fire records, general public records, and related categories.
fields.key_stats: The public records request log (partial, pages 1–3 of 15) shows at least 62 requests logged on January 23, 2026 alone, spanning Police Department Records (majority), General Public Records, and Fire Department Records. Common request types include Police Reports, Background Requests, Building Plans/Permits, 911 Dispatch Calls, Photos, Traffic Accidents, and Form I-918/U-Visa.
